PASS 2: ⚠ RFC-1918 private IPs found in payload: [10.0.0.10, 192.168.1.100]. Presence in log body from 10.0.0.10 indicates active internal network traversal — HTTP_REQUEST with embedded internal targets is a lateral spread indicator.
